_comment: Cell colors for the watch-list table. Single source of truth: build.py generates the CSS from this, and compute.test.mjs asserts every fg clears WCAG AA (4.5:1) against its own tint composited over `surface`. The page is dark-only, so contrast is checked, not eyeballed. Hues match the competitiveness page's buckets; `gone` gets its own hue because churn is the outcome this page is about.
